variants: At the intersection of technology and creativity, Shaelyn Derry thrives as a member of the Tinderbox Tricksters, a club that encourages inventive tech projects. She specializes in computer engineering, drawing upon the mentorship of Ivan Cvitkovic throughout her academic journey. Funding from the Radiant Equinox Endowment has played a key role in supporting her research, enhancing her contributions to the field. In recognition of her diverse skill set, she holds a Starship Gardener Label, highlighting her commitment to excellence in engineering.
